topics.title: George Takei and CBS FM Updates
topics.summary: The studio welcomes George Takei back to the show while discussing his recent awards from Leonard Nimoy and updates regarding the return of CBS FM.

topics.title: Star Trek and Weight Loss Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores topics ranging from a guest's weight loss journey and appearance on Larry King to the cultural nuances of Star Trek character names in Japan.

topics.title: Radio Show Dynamics and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio discusses internal staff dynamics, upcoming show specials, and features guest appearances from George Takei and Lisa G.

topics.title: Beach Bird Rescue and Therapy
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the guest's experience with therapy for performance anxiety, his wife's appearance in magazines, and a dramatic incident involving the rescue of a distressed gannet on a beach.

topics.title: Howard Stern Responds to Movie Rumors
topics.summary: The show addresses reports of a film featuring a character based on Howard Stern and clarifies that he has no involvement with or knowledge of the production.

topics.title: Radio Guest Experiences and Chess Strategy
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who discusses her experiences with media interviews, her personal interests in chess and fitness, and the complexities of navigating celebrity social circles.

topics.title: Riley Martin and Howard Stern Exchange
topics.summary: The studio features a heated exchange between Howard Stern and Riley Martin regarding contract negotiations, personal behavior, and an upcoming appearance.

topics.title: iPhone Hype and Pittsburgh Comedy Tour
topics.summary: The studio discusses the cultural frenzy surrounding the launch of the iPhone and a comedian's past experiences performing in Pittsburgh.

topics.title: Comedy Club Tour and Road Trip Encounters
topics.summary: The studio recounts a series of experiences involving comedy club performances at the Funny Bone, interactions with fans in green rooms, and a subsequent road trip to Pittsburgh where a romantic encounter occurred.

topics.title: Beetlejuice Encounter and Bus Ride Tales
topics.summary: The studio features stories about an encounter with Beetlejuice in a hotel room, Richard's experience on a bus to Atlantic City, and various discussions regarding film reviews and radio personalities.

topics.title: Interactive Game and Book Controversy
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where guests play a game involving hidden objects in a pouch followed by a discussion regarding an unauthorized book foreword.

topics.title: Introduction of Jamie Hilfiger as Ms. Howard TV
topics.summary: The studio introduces Jamie Hilfiger as the new Ms. Howard TV for August and discusses her background, career aspirations, and personal life.

topics.title: Sports and Celebrity News Segment
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including Barry Bonds' media outburst, celebrity wedding news involving Rebecca Romain, John Stamos's public appearance, Lindsay Lohan's recovery status, and an incident at a Yankees game.

topics.title: Stadium Incident and Medical Procedures
topics.summary: The show covers a stadium incident involving a fall from upper seating, a caller's experience with a vasectomy, and various international news reports including military operations in Iraq and legal issues in California.

topics.title: Church Abuse Settlements and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers a large settlement regarding priest abuse cases, the death of Lady Bird Johnson, the success of the Harry Potter films, and various celebrity news items including Victoria Beckham's move to the U.S. and upcoming comedy tour dates.
